---
title: "Project Watch"
subtitle: "Learn by studying real AI projects"
description: "Curated, annotated deep dives into notable AI projects. Understand the engineering decisions, trace the source code, and connect everything back to what you're learning in the cohort."
css: ../styles/blog.css
---

Project Watch is where we study real AI projects in depth. Each entry is a full annotated walkthrough — what the project does, why the engineering decisions matter, and how it connects to what you're learning in the [Roadmap](../roadmap.qmd).

## Projects

::: {.repo-cards}

:::: {.repo-card}
::: {.repo-card-header}
<span class="repo-card-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M2 2.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4.5 0h8.75a.75.75 0 0 1 .75.75v12.5a.75.75 0 0 1-.75.75h-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.5h1.75v-2h-8a1 1 0 0 0-.714 1.7.75.75 0 1 1-1.072 1.05A2.495 2.495 0 0 1 2 11.5Zm10.5-1h-8a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v6.708A2.486 2.486 0 0 1 4.5 9h8ZM5 12.25a.25.25 0 0 1 .25-.25h3.5a.25.25 0 0 1 .25.25v3.25a.25.25 0 0 1-.4.2l-1.45-1.087a.249.249 0 0 0-.3 0L5.4 15.7a.25.25 0 0 1-.4-.2Z"/></svg></span>
[unsloth / monkey-patching](unsloth-monkey-patching.qmd){.repo-card-name}
:::

::: {.repo-card-desc}
How monkey patching makes LLM inference 2x faster by replacing HuggingFace internals at runtime. Fused GPU kernels, practical optimization, and why it matters for every model you will ever serve.
:::

::: {.repo-card-footer}
[inference]{.repo-card-tag} [gpu]{.repo-card-tag} [optimization]{.repo-card-tag}
:::
::::

:::: {.repo-card}
::: {.repo-card-header}
<span class="repo-card-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M2 2.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4.5 0h8.75a.75.75 0 0 1 .75.75v12.5a.75.75 0 0 1-.75.75h-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.5h1.75v-2h-8a1 1 0 0 0-.714 1.7.75.75 0 1 1-1.072 1.05A2.495 2.495 0 0 1 2 11.5Zm10.5-1h-8a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v6.708A2.486 2.486 0 0 1 4.5 9h8ZM5 12.25a.25.25 0 0 1 .25-.25h3.5a.25.25 0 0 1 .25.25v3.25a.25.25 0 0 1-.4.2l-1.45-1.087a.249.249 0 0 0-.3 0L5.4 15.7a.25.25 0 0 1-.4-.2Z"/></svg></span>
[autoresearch / research-harness](autoresearch.qmd){.repo-card-name}
:::

::: {.repo-card-desc}
How the community turned a toy training loop into an agentic ResearchOps platform. Agents, search policy, verification, and the future of AI R&D.
:::

::: {.repo-card-footer}
[agents]{.repo-card-tag} [research]{.repo-card-tag} [automation]{.repo-card-tag}
:::
::::

:::

::: {.blog-back}
[← Back to Roadmap](../roadmap.qmd)
:::
